crime.value: Shooting of Michael; central question: did Amelia shoot him or is she being framed?
crime.quote: I don't understand how they could say I shot Michael.

victim.value: Michael, medical student in love with his best friend Amelia; targeted possibly due to his relationship with her

closed_world.value: Legal/judicial system with courthouse, jail, and limited cast of characters including judge, lawyers, and suspects
closed_world.quote: long after the courthouse had emptied and the street lights came on

investigator.value: Michael's spirit/ghost observing events after his apparent death, trying to protect Amelia and uncover the truth
investigator.quote: Attempting to shield Amelia, I hovered in between them.

suspect_architecture.value: Limited suspect pool visible: Sharolette (stepmother figure with sarcastic demeanor and suspicious timing), Mr. Crandoff (defense attorney with unclear motivations), Judge (conflicted about using Amelia as bait), Walter Joneson (unknown phone contact)
suspect_architecture.quote: You sure have got yourself into a mess this time. And your daddy isn't around to rescue you.

red_herring.value: Amelia being charged with shooting Michael appears to be misdirection - Michael's ghost narrator perspective suggests he knows she's innocent and there's a larger conspiracy involving using her as 'bait'
red_herring.quote: I don't understand how they could say I shot Michael.

social_world.value: Medical school hierarchy (Michael as student), legal system power structure (judge, defense attorney), family/inheritance dynamics (Sharolette as promised caretaker after father's death), institutional conspiracy
social_world.quote: I always promised your father I would take care of you. You know—if anything ever happened to him.

reveal_mechanic.value: Supernatural revelation through Michael's ghost perspective - he can observe conversations and motivations invisible to living characters, including judge's phone calls about conspiracy
reveal_mechanic.quote: What do you mean bait? Bait isn't safe! Bait ends up dead! Get her out of here, you moron!

media_and_audience.value: Legal system as public narrative mechanism - trial proceedings, jury verdict system, and institutional cover-up involving multiple parties coordinating Amelia's fate
media_and_audience.quote: The jury should deliver their verdict tomorrow. I guess it will tell us exactly how bad her situation is.

investigator_wound.value: Michael's wound is his helpless love and inability to protect Amelia - dead but conscious, he can observe the conspiracy against her but cannot intervene or communicate
investigator_wound.quote: How frustrating he couldn't hear me.

_meta.title: ebook bethlee out of the darkness
